directive: C4390 Lead: #378 shipped (d273521 — measurements Prisma JSON + admin form + PDP 6-col grid + JSON-LD additionalProperty + Czech extractor regex including inseam/krok). Measurement data layer COMPLETE. New Bolt focus: #379 PDP 'Jak měřit?' guide modal/drawer — closes the UX loop so customers know how to compare values against a garment they already own (the #1 second-hand returns reducer per Baymard). Small scoped task, single commit. Trace #358 + #367 unchanged. Guard #366 unchanged. Sage micro-polish continues — consider a visual polish pass on the new PDP Rozměry grid (borders, label typography) once #379 lands. External blockers unchanged: #329 DNS, #1 R2, #14 GMC (Apr 30 Doppl VTO — 12 days), #216 GA4, #330 nginx.

BOLT.notes: NEW PRIORITY: #379 PDP 'Jak měřit?' guide. #378 measurements DONE (d273521) — now customers need to understand how we took each measurement so they can compare to a garment they already own (the point of flat-lay measurements). Concrete scope: (1) create src/components/shop/measurement-guide.tsx — shadcn Dialog on desktop + Drawer on mobile (or responsive Dialog with mobile bottom-sheet styling). (2) Content: short intro 'Všechny míry jsou naměřené na plocho, na oblečení položeném naležato. Porovnej s kouskem, který ti sedí.' Then per-measurement explanation: Šířka v pase (topy: 3cm pod paží, od kraje ke kraji; kalhoty/sukně: pas, od kraje ke kraji; měř ×2 pro obvod). Šířka v bocích (v nejširší části). Délka (od límce/horního kraje k lemu). Rukáv (od ramenního švu k manžetě). Krok / vnitřní nohavice (od rozkroku k lemu). Include 2-3 simple inline SVG diagrams (flat garment outline with measurement arrows) — keep minimalist, no heavy assets. (3) Wire trigger: find where PDP renders the Rozměry section (grep for 'Rozměry' — likely src/components/shop/product-info-accordion.tsx or a new product-measurements-section.tsx) — add a small ghost-button link 'Jak měříme?' next to the heading that opens the guide. (4) Only render the trigger if measurements exist for the product (hasMeasurements helper). Czech UI, mobile-first, no autofocus traps. Single commit. npm run build green. THEN resume Hetzner (#341/#343) once #329 DNS unblocks.

blockers_external.65: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var needed for Bolt acknowledged #2220 — non-blocking for #376/#373/#377

TRACE.notes: PRIORITY: #358 RC.7 E2E /admin/jarvis — iframe architecture (not WS/xterm). Playwright spec: admin logs in → navigates /admin/jarvis → expects breadcrumb 'JARVIS' + login instructions card visible → expects iframe present with src matching NEXT_PUBLIC_JARVIS_REMOTE_URL (default jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz) → no console errors (page.on('pageerror') / page.on('console')) → no CSP violations. Skip WS/xterm flow entirely. THEN #367 full codebase quality sweep: npx tsc --noEmit, knip or ts-prune dead exports, security smells (process.env leaks to client, console.log of PII, missing rate limits on POST routes). THEN #324 regression grep: zero 'vinted' campaign refs in HEAD (src/, prisma/, scripts/ — docs/ excepted). THEN #327 Redis cache-aside verify. THEN #351 cold-read audit + #347 Lighthouse baseline. Standing e2e: category switching (/products?category=saty → Topy) + customer portal C3709 flows. DO NOT touch Hetzner migration code paths.

SAGE.notes: NEW: C4389 Bolt shipped measurements PDP grid (d273521) — polish the 6-col Rozměry grid: label typography weight/color, value alignment, cell borders/dividers, responsive collapse (6-col → 3-col → 2-col on narrow mobile), empty-state hiding consistency. Then polish the new #379 'Jak měříme?' trigger once it lands — make sure it feels like a natural secondary link next to the Rozměry heading, not a primary CTA. Standing micro-passes: (a) PDP price history sparkline placement, condition badge weight, related-products carousel arrow hover, gallery thumbnail focus ring. (b) Cart sold-item toast when reservation expires. (c) Checkout accordion section transitions + completed-state checkmark entrance. UI-only, no schema changes.

GUARD.notes: PRIORITY: #366 SEC-1 Remote Console full-stack audit — iframe architecture (jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, NOT WS bridge). Scope: (1) frame-src CSP correctness — only jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, no wildcards, verify in middleware/next.config CSP source; (2) frame-ancestors on /admin/jarvis parent so the page can't be re-framed; (3) iframe sandbox attrs minimum-privilege; (4) CF Access JWT propagation to embedded Claude UI — admin must re-auth at tunnel boundary, no implicit trust; (5) referrer-policy doesn't leak /admin/jarvis pathname to iframe origin; (6) cookies SameSite on parent NextAuth session; (7) audit log integrity for /api/admin/jarvis if still active — userId/userEmail not null, no PII in stderr; (8) confirm jarvis-terminal.tsx + xterm deps fully purged. Deliverable: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md with findings + severity + fix proposals. THEN #330 nginx hardening — CSP frame-src comgate.eu, rate limits, 20M cap scoped to /api/uploadthing*, X-Forwarded-* sanitization, TLS 1.2+.

hard_rules: DO NOT re-add Vinted campaign (see NEVER_ADD_VINTED_CAMPAIGN.md).
NEVER push to remote without bectly's explicit request.
Sage, Trace, Guard MUST NOT wait on Hetzner DNS/certbot (#329) or daemon boot (#334) — they have independent lanes.
Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq/systemd); other agents do not touch them.
